mapper.select: SELECT m.module_code AS moduleCode, m.module_name AS moduleName, b.stage_code AS stageCode, b.capability AS capability, b.role_code AS roleCode, CAST(p.id AS CHAR) AS providerId, b.priority AS priority, b.timeout_seconds AS timeoutSeconds, b.retry_attempts AS retryAttempts, b.health_source AS healthSource, b.is_default AS isDefault, b.runtime_settings_json AS runtimeSettingsJson, r.resource_code AS resourceCode, r.resource_name AS resourceName, r.resource_type AS resourceType, r.model_name AS modelName, r.voice_code AS voiceCode, r.language_code AS languageCode, r.resource_settings_json AS resourceSettingsJson, p.provider_code AS providerCode, p.provider_name AS providerName, p.vendor_code AS vendorCode, p.auth_type AS authType, p.endpoint_url AS endpointUrl, p.app_id AS appId, p.api_key AS apiKey, p.api_secret AS apiSecret, p.access_token AS accessToken, p.extra_auth_json AS extraAuthJson FROM xm_ai_module_binding b INNER JOIN xm_ai_module m ON m.id = b.module_id AND m.tenant_id = b.tenant_id INNER JOIN xm_ai_resource r ON r.id = b.resource_id AND r.tenant_id = b.tenant_id INNER JOIN xm_ai_provider p ON p.id = r.provider_id AND p.tenant_id = b.tenant_id WHERE b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND m.module_code = #{moduleCode} AND m.status = '0' AND b.status = '0' AND r.status = '0' AND p.status = '0' AND m.del_flag = '0' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' AND p.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY b.stage_code ASC, b.capability ASC, b.priority ASC, b.id ASC
